name: ETH Squeeze Persistence v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the best-fit similar-asset lane for testing volatility squeeze expansion confirmed by persistence instead of the first breakout bar. The edge should come from expansion that proves itself by holding structure, not from immediate breakout chasing.
invalidation_condition: Abort if squeeze setups are too rare, if persistence confirmation conflicts with the expansion setup, or if follow-through is too weak after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Compression resolves into expansion, but entry is delayed until the move shows persistence rather than taking the very first breakout impulse.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Mixed chop and trend-up distributions frequently fake the first breakout bar. Requiring structure hold after the squeeze should filter the weakest expansions while still capturing genuine follow-through.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for a persistence-confirmed squeeze because its expansions are usually more orderly than TAO while still respecting the same basket brief.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If squeeze breaks resolve as one-bar fakeouts without real hold, persistence confirmation may still be too late or too restrictive.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If setups exist but follow-through is shallow, reduce runner exposure before loosening the squeeze definition.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; squeeze is setup, EMA hold and ADX are persistence confirmation
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: kept manageable by moderate compression thresholds instead of extreme squeeze-only definitions
